overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring ray-traced reflections on wet pavement, neon-lit glass towers, and digital billboards. The player exits a building, explores the open plaza, crosses a street, and enters another secure building.

events.description: exiting building through automatic glass doors into open neon-lit plaza

agents.ego_description: walking forward through glass doors from interior lobby into wet reflective plaza

smooth marble wall panels with red vertical accent strips
large digital billboard displaying 'GOT CHROME?' advertisement with yellow text

large rectangular planters with greenery flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a sleek modern building lobby with marble walls and red accents. The camera moves steadily forward through automatic glass doors, transitioning from the enclosed interior to an open exterior plaza. The wet reflective pavement and a large digital billboard become visible as the exit is approached.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with digital advertising towers

events.description: turning left to look up at tall glass building facade with illuminated windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking around at digital billboards and futuristic architecture

modern canopy structure with red neon edge lighting
mature trees in large planters with uplighting
sleek black benches for pedestrian seating

segments.scene_description: Walking through the wide open plaza surrounded by towering glass buildings and massive digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon pink and green lighting. The camera turns to admire the impressive architecture of a glass office tower before continuing through the commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with staircase leading to street level

events.description: ascending outdoor stairs with glass railings to upper plaza level
approaching street crosswalk with yellow zebra stripes

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and walking across upper plaza toward street crossing

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with non-slip surface leading upward
transparent glass panels with metal posts for safety
tall rectangular light fixtures with white glow
pedestrian crossing marked with bold yellow and black stripes
multi-story structure covered in digital advertising screens

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends outdoor stairs with glass railings to an upper plaza level, passing illuminated bollards. The scene opens toward a street crossing marked with yellow zebra stripes, with a massive digital billboard tower visible in the distance and palm trees lining the approach to the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing and sidewalk approaching secure building entrance

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives across the crosswalk from right to left
entering secure building through access-controlled glass doors

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street, walking along the sidewalk, and approaching the building entrance access panel

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving across the crosswalk from right to left
person holding red umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern building facade with dark wood paneling and glass entrance
wall-mounted security panel with illuminated display showing lock status
long hallway with reflective floors and red accent lighting visible through glass
transparent glass partitions lining the interior corridor

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet street with yellow zebra stripes as a futuristic sedan passes by. The camera continues along the sidewalk past a pedestrian with a red umbrella, approaches a modern building entrance with a digital access panel, and enters through automatic glass doors into a sleek interior corridor with red accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a modern lobby out into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk plaza before concluding inside another secure facility. It begins within a sleek lobby of marble and red accents, moving steadily through automatic glass doors to reveal a wide exterior plaza of wet, reflective pavement. As the camera traverses this open space, the environment transforms into a canyon of towering glass office buildings and massive digital billboards casting pink and green light across the ground. The scene then ascends a set of glass-railed stairs to an upper level, opening up toward a street crossing lined with palm trees and a distant billboard tower. Finally, the camera crosses the yellow zebra stripes of the wet street past a futuristic sedan and a pedestrian with a red umbrella, moving through a digital access panel and automatic doors back into a sleek interior corridor with red accent lighting.
